tasks.title: Create Lead, LeadScore, and ScoringConfig database schemas
tasks.description: Create all three tables from the data model: Lead, LeadScore, ScoringConfig. Add Prisma schema definitions with relationships (Lead 1:N LeadScore). Seed ScoringConfig with default weights.
tasks.validation: Migration runs, all 3 tables exist with correct fields, seed data present in ScoringConfig

tasks.title: Implement scoring calculation service
tasks.description: Create the core scoring function: read ScoringConfig, calculate weighted sum, classify into tier, clamp to 0-100. Log all calculations with input factors. Handle missing optional factors (score 0, tier cold).
tasks.validation: Unit tests pass: normal scoring, missing factors returns 0, out-of-range clamped, all calculations logged

tasks.title: Create score trigger endpoint
tasks.description: Create POST /leads/{id}/score endpoint. Reads lead from DB, calls scoring service, stores LeadScore, returns response with factor breakdown.
tasks.validation: POST returns 200 with score and factors, 404 for missing lead, 422 for insufficient data

tasks.title: Implement scoring config admin API
tasks.description: Create GET /scoring/config and PUT /scoring/config endpoints. PUT validates hot > warm threshold, audit-logs changes with user ID and timestamp. Reject invalid weights.
tasks.validation: GET returns current config, PUT updates and logs, 400 on invalid thresholds, 403 without admin permission

tasks.title: Create batch re-scoring queue
tasks.description: Create BullMQ job that re-scores all active leads when config changes. Queue new jobs after in-progress ones complete (no cancellation). Target: 10,000 leads in < 5 minutes.
tasks.validation: Config change triggers batch job, concurrent config changes queue sequentially, 10k leads scored within 5 min

tasks.title: Add Redis cache for score lookups
tasks.description: Cache latest LeadScore in Redis keyed by lead_id. Invalidate on re-score. Fall back to PostgreSQL when Redis is unavailable. Log cache misses.
tasks.validation: Cache hit returns score in < 50ms, cache miss falls back to PG, Redis down doesn't break reads

tasks.title: Implement event-driven score recalculation
tasks.description: Listen for CRM field updates, form submissions, and engagement events. Deduplicate by lead_id with 2-second debounce. Trigger scoring and update cache.
tasks.validation: Event triggers re-score, duplicate events within 2s are debounced, cache updated after scoring

tasks.title: Add tier-change notification
tasks.description: After each score calculation, compare old and new tier. If tier crossed a boundary, send in-app notification to assigned_rep_id.
tasks.validation: Tier change from warm to hot sends notification, same-tier re-score does not

tasks.title: Create scoring report endpoint
tasks.description: Create GET /scoring/report with date range params. Query LeadScore history, aggregate by tier, calculate conversion rates. Ensure 12-month retention policy in query.
tasks.validation: Report returns correct distribution and conversion rates for given date range

tasks.title: Add score history retention policy
tasks.description: Create scheduled job that deletes LeadScore records older than 12 months. Run daily.
tasks.validation: Job deletes records older than 12 months, retains records within window
